Base directory for this skill: /Users/4gray/.claude/skills/userinterface-wiki

# User Interface Wiki

Comprehensive UI/UX best practices guide for web interfaces. Contains 152 rules across 12 categories, prioritized by impact to guide automated code review and generation.

## When to Apply

Reference these guidelines when:
- Implementing or reviewing animations (CSS transitions, Motion/Framer Motion)
- Choosing between springs, easing curves, or no animation
- Working with AnimatePresence and exit animations
- Writing CSS with pseudo-elements or View Transitions API
- Adding audio feedback or procedural sound to UI
- Building morphing icon components
- Animating container width/height with dynamic content
- Designing UI that respects cognitive psychology (Fitts's, Hick's, Miller's laws)
- Implementing predictive prefetching for perceived performance
- Setting up typography, OpenType features, or numeric formatting

## Rule Categories by Priority

| Priority | Category | Impact | Prefixes |
|----------|----------|--------|----------|
| 1 | Animation Principles | CRITICAL | `timing-`, `physics-`, `staging-` |
| 2 | Timing Functions | HIGH | `spring-`, `easing-`, `duration-`, `none-` |
| 3 | Exit Animations | HIGH | `exit-`, `presence-`, `mode-`, `nested-` |
| 4 | CSS Pseudo Elements | MEDIUM | `pseudo-`, `transition-`, `native-` |
| 5 | Audio Feedback | MEDIUM | `a11y-`, `appropriate-`, `impl-`, `weight-` |
| 6 | Sound Synthesis | MEDIUM | `context-`, `envelope-`, `design-`, `param-` |
| 7 | Morphing Icons | LOW | `morphing-` |
| 8 | Container Animation | MEDIUM | `container-` |
| 9 | Laws of UX | HIGH | `ux-` |
| 10 | Predictive Prefetching | MEDIUM | `prefetch-` |
| 11 | Typography | MEDIUM | `type-` |
| 12 | Visual Design | HIGH | `visual-` |

## Quick Reference

### 1. Animation Principles (CRITICAL)

- `timing-under-300ms` - User animations must complete within 300ms
- `timing-consistent` - Similar elements use identical timing values
- `timing-no-entrance-context-menu` - Context menus: no entrance animation, exit only
- `easing-natural-decay` - Use exponential ramps for natural decay, not linear
- `easing-no-linear-motion` - Linear easing only for progress indicators
- `physics-active-state` - Interactive elements need :active scale transform
- `physics-subtle-deformation` - Squash/stretch in 0.95-1.05 range
- `physics-spring-for-overshoot` - Springs for overshoot-and-settle, not easing
- `physics-no-excessive-stagger` - Stagger delays under 50ms per item
- `staging-one-focal-point` - One prominent animation at a time
- `staging-dim-background` - Dim modal/dialog backgrounds
- `staging-z-index-hierarchy` - Animated elements respect z-index layers

### 2. Timing Functions (HIGH)

- `spring-for-gestures` - Gesture-driven motion (drag, flick) must use springs
- `spring-for-interruptible` - Interruptible motion must use springs
- `spring-preserves-velocity` - Springs preserve input energy on release
- `spring-params-balanced` - Avoid excessive oscillation in spring params
- `easing-for-state-change` - System state changes use easing curves
- `easing-entrance-ease-out` - Entrances use ease-out
- `easing-exit-ease-in` - Exits use ease-in
- `easing-transition-ease-in-out` - View transitions use ease-in-out
- `easing-linear-only-progress` - Linear only for progress/time representation
- `duration-press-hover` - Press/hover: 120-180ms
- `duration-small-state` - Small state changes: 180-260ms
- `duration-max-300ms` - User-initiated max 300ms
- `duration-shorten-before-curve` - Fix slow feel with shorter duration, not curve
- `none-high-frequency` - No animation for high-frequency interactions
- `none-keyboard-navigation` - Keyboard navigation instant, no animation
- `none-context-menu-entrance` - Context menus: no entrance, exit only

### 3. Exit Animations (HIGH)

- `exit-requires-wrapper` - Conditional motion elements need AnimatePresence wrapper
- `exit-prop-required` - Elements in AnimatePresence need exit prop
- `exit-key-required` - Dynamic lists need unique keys, not index
- `exit-matches-initial` - Exit mirrors initial for symmetry
- `presence-hook-in-child` - useIsPresent in child, not parent
- `presence-safe-to-remove` - Call safeToRemove after async cleanup
- `presence-disable-interactions` - Disable interactions on exiting elements
- `mode-wait-doubles-duration` - Mode "wait" doubles duration; halve timing
- `mode-sync-layout-conflict` - Mode "sync" causes layout conflicts
- `mode-pop-layout-for-lists` - Use popLayout for list reordering
- `nested-propagate-required` - Nested AnimatePresence needs propagate prop
- `nested-consistent-timing` - Coordinate parent-child exit durations

### 4. CSS Pseudo Elements (MEDIUM)

- `pseudo-content-required` - ::before/::after need content property
- `pseudo-over-dom-node` - Pseudo-elements over extra DOM nodes for decoration
- `pseudo-position-relative-parent` - Parent needs position: relative
- `pseudo-z-index-layering` - Z-index for correct pseudo-element layering
- `pseudo-hit-target-expansion` - Negative inset for larger hit targets
- `pseudo-marker-styling` - Use ::marker for custom list bullet styles
- `pseudo-first-line-styling` - Use ::first-line for typographic treatments
- `transition-name-required` - View transitions need view-transition-name
- `transition-name-unique` - Each transition name unique during transition
- `transition-name-cleanup` - Remove transition name after completion
- `transition-over-js-library` - Prefer View Transitions API over JS libraries
- `transition-style-pseudo-elements` - Style ::view-transition-group for custom animations
- `native-backdrop-styling` - Use ::backdrop for dialog backgrounds
- `native-placeholder-styling` - Use ::placeholder for input styling
- `native-selection-styling` - Use ::selection for text selection styling

### 5. Audio Feedback (MEDIUM)

- `a11y-visual-equivalent` - Every sound must have a visual equivalent
- `a11y-toggle-setting` - Provide toggle to disable sounds
- `a11y-reduced-motion-check` - Respect prefers-reduced-motion for sound
- `a11y-volume-control` - Allow independent volume adjustment
- `appropriate-no-high-frequency` - No sound on typing or keyboard nav
- `appropriate-confirmations-only` - Sound for payments, uploads, submissions
- `appropriate-errors-warnings` - Sound for errors that can't be overlooked
- `appropriate-no-decorative` - No sound on hover or decorative moments
- `appropriate-no-punishing` - Inform, don't punish with harsh sounds
- `impl-preload-audio` - Preload audio files to avoid delay
- `impl-default-subtle` - Default volume subtle (0.3), not loud
- `impl-reset-current-time` - Reset currentTime before replay
- `weight-match-action` - Sound weight matches action importance
- `weight-duration-matches-action` - Sound duration matches action duration

### 6. Sound Synthesis (MEDIUM)

- `context-reuse-single` - Reuse single AudioContext, don't create per sound
- `context-resume-suspended` - Resume suspended AudioContext before playing
- `context-cleanup-nodes` - Disconnect audio nodes after playback
- `envelope-exponential-decay` - Exponential ramps for natural decay
- `envelope-no-zero-target` - Exponential ramps target 0.001, not 0
- `envelope-set-initial-value` - Set initial value before ramping
- `design-noise-for-percussion` - Filtered noise for clicks/taps
- `design-oscillator-for-tonal` - Oscillators with pitch sweep for tonal sounds
- `design-filter-for-character` - Bandpass filter to shape percussive sounds
- `param-click-duration` - Click sounds: 5-15ms duration
- `param-filter-frequency-range` - Click filter: 3000-6000Hz
- `param-reasonable-gain` - Gain under 1.0 to prevent clipping
- `param-q-value-range` - Filter Q: 2-5 for focused but natural

### 7. Morphing Icons (LOW)

- `morphing-three-lines` - Every icon uses exactly 3 SVG lines
- `morphing-use-collapsed` - Unused lines use collapsed constant
- `morphing-consistent-viewbox` - All icons share same viewBox (14x14)
- `morphing-group-variants` - Rotational variants share group and base lines
- `morphing-spring-rotation` - Spring physics for grouped icon rotation
- `morphing-reduced-motion` - Respect prefers-reduced-motion
- `morphing-jump-non-grouped` - Instant rotation jump between non-grouped icons
- `morphing-strokelinecap-round` - Round stroke line caps
- `morphing-aria-hidden` - Icon SVGs are aria-hidden

### 8. Container Animation (MEDIUM)

- `container-two-div-pattern` - Outer animated div, inner measured div; never same element
- `container-guard-initial-zero` - Guard bounds === 0 on initial render, fall back to "auto"
- `container-use-resize-observer` - Use ResizeObserver for measurement, not getBoundingClientRect
- `container-overflow-hidden` - Set overflow: hidden on animated container during transitions
- `container-no-excessive-use` - Use sparingly: buttons, accordions, interactive elements
- `container-callback-ref` - Use callback ref (not useRef) for measurement hooks
- `container-transition-delay` - Add small delay for natural catching-up feel

### 9. Laws of UX (HIGH)

- `ux-fitts-target-size` - Size interactive targets for easy clicking (min 32px)
- `ux-fitts-hit-area` - Expand hit areas with invisible padding or pseudo-elements
- `ux-hicks-minimize-choices` - Minimize choices to reduce decision time
- `ux-millers-chunking` - Chunk data into groups of 5-9 for scannability
- `ux-doherty-under-400ms` - Respond within 400ms to feel instant
- `ux-doherty-perceived-speed` - Fake speed with skeletons, optimistic UI, progress indicators
- `ux-postels-accept-messy-input` - Accept messy input, output clean data
- `ux-progressive-disclosure` - Show what matters now, reveal complexity later
- `ux-jakobs-familiar-patterns` - Use familiar UI patterns users know from other sites
- `ux-aesthetic-usability` - Visual polish increases perceived usability
- `ux-proximity-grouping` - Group related elements spatially with tighter spacing
- `ux-similarity-consistency` - Similar elements should look alike
- `ux-common-region-boundaries` - Use boundaries to group related content
- `ux-von-restorff-emphasis` - Make important elements visually distinct
- `ux-serial-position` - Place key items first or last in sequences
- `ux-peak-end-finish-strong` - End experiences with clear success states
- `ux-teslers-complexity` - Move complexity to the system, not the user
- `ux-goal-gradient-progress` - Show progress toward completion
- `ux-zeigarnik-show-incomplete` - Show incomplete state to drive completion
- `ux-pragnanz-simplify` - Simplify complex visuals into clear forms
- `ux-pareto-prioritize-features` - Prioritize the critical 20% of features
- `ux-cognitive-load-reduce` - Minimize extraneous cognitive load
- `ux-uniform-connectedness` - Visually connect related elements with lines or frames

### 10. Predictive Prefetching (MEDIUM)

- `prefetch-trajectory-over-hover` - Trajectory prediction over hover; reclaims 100-200ms
- `prefetch-not-everything` - Prefetch by intent, not viewport; avoid wasted bandwidth
- `prefetch-hit-slop` - Use hitSlop to trigger predictions earlier
- `prefetch-touch-fallback` - Fall back gracefully on touch devices (no cursor)
- `prefetch-keyboard-tab` - Prefetch on keyboard navigation when focus approaches
- `prefetch-use-selectively` - Use predictive prefetching where latency is noticeable

### 11. Typography (MEDIUM)

- `type-tabular-nums-for-data` - Tabular numbers for columns, dashboards, pricing
- `type-oldstyle-nums-for-prose` - Oldstyle numbers blend into body text
- `type-slashed-zero` - Slashed zero in code-adjacent UIs
- `type-opentype-contextual-alternates` - Keep calt enabled for contextual glyph adjustment
- `type-disambiguation-stylistic-set` - Enable ss02 to distinguish I/l/1 and 0/O
- `type-optical-sizing-auto` - Leave font-optical-sizing auto for size-adaptive glyphs
- `type-antialiased-on-retina` - Antialiased font smoothing on retina displays
- `type-text-wrap-balance-headings` - text-wrap: balance on headings for even lines
- `type-underline-offset` - Offset underlines below descenders
- `type-no-font-synthesis` - Disable font-synthesis to prevent faux bold/italic
- `type-font-display-swap` - Use font-display: swap to avoid invisible text during load
- `type-variable-weight-continuous` - Use continuous weight values (100-900) with variable fonts
- `type-text-wrap-pretty` - text-wrap: pretty for body text to reduce orphans
- `type-justify-with-hyphens` - Pair text-align: justify with hyphens: auto
- `type-letter-spacing-uppercase` - Add letter-spacing to uppercase and small-caps text
- `type-proper-fractions` - Use diagonal-fractions for proper typographic fractions

### 12. Visual Design (HIGH)

- `visual-concentric-radius` - Inner radius = outer radius minus padding for nested elements
- `visual-layered-shadows` - Layer multiple shadows for realistic depth
- `visual-shadow-direction` - All shadows share same offset direction (single light source)
- `visual-no-pure-black-shadow` - Use neutral colors, not pure black, for shadows
- `visual-shadow-matches-elevation` - Shadow size indicates elevation in consistent scale
- `visual-animate-shadow-pseudo` - Animate shadow via pseudo-element opacity for performance
- `visual-consistent-spacing-scale` - Use a consistent spacing scale, not arbitrary values
- `visual-border-alpha-colors` - Semi-transparent borders adapt to any background
- `visual-button-shadow-anatomy` - Six-layer shadow anatomy for polished buttons

## How to Use

Read individual rule files for detailed explanations and code examples:

```
rules/timing-under-300ms.md
rules/spring-for-gestures.md
rules/ux-doherty-under-400ms.md
rules/type-tabular-nums-for-data.md
```

Each rule file contains:
- Brief explanation of why it matters
- Incorrect code example with explanation
- Correct code example with explanation

## Full Compiled Document

For the complete guide with all rules expanded: `AGENTS.md`

Explore the IPTVnator Angular codebase for interactive UI/UX patterns. I need a thorough audit of:

1. Button and click target sizes: search for `mat-button`, `mat-icon-button`, button elements in templates, and their sizing in CSS
2. Hit area / touch target patterns: search for padding on buttons, `::before`/`::after` for hit expansion
3. Typography patterns: search for `font-family`, `font-size`, `font-feature-settings`, `tabular-nums`, `text-wrap`, `font-display` in CSS/SCSS

5. Virtual scroll / list patterns for performance
6. Spacing patterns and consistency (check for arbitrary vs systematic spacing values)

Check both global styles and component-level styles in apps/web/src/ and libs/.

1. Shadow patterns: search for `box-shadow` in CSS/SCSS files - check if layered, consistent direction, using pure black
2. Border radius patterns: search for `border-radius` - check for concentric radius (inner = outer - padding)
3. Color usage: search for `rgba`, `hsla`, semi-transparent borders
4. Reduced motion support: search for `prefers-reduced-motion`
5. ARIA attributes: search for `aria-label`, `aria-hidden`, `role=` in templates
6. Keyboard navigation patterns: search for `tabindex`, `(keydown)`, `(keyup)`, focus management
7. Audio feedback: search for `AudioContext`, `Audio(`, sound-related code
8. Overflow handling: search for `overflow:`, `overflow-x`, `overflow-y` patterns

Check apps/web/src/ and libs/ directories. Note file paths and line numbers.

Perfect! I now have comprehensive information to provide a thorough UI/UX patterns audit. Let me compile the findings:

## IPTVnator UI/UX Animation & Timing Audit

Based on a thorough exploration of the Angular codebase, here is a comprehensive audit of animations, transitions, and UI/UX patterns:

---

### 1. CSS TRANSITIONS & EASING CURVES

#### Navigation & Interactive Elements
- **File**: `/Users/4gray/Code/iptvnator/apps/web/src/nav-list.scss` (lines 28-33)
  - Pattern: Multi-property transitions on nav items
  - Properties: `background 0.15s ease`, `color 0.15s ease`, `border-color 0.15s ease`, `box-shadow 0.18s ease`, `transform 0.18s ease`
  - Hover state: translateY(-1px) with gradient background
  - Used for: Navigation list items with selected/active states

#### Settings & Configuration
- **File**: `/Users/4gray/Code/iptvnator/apps/web/src/app/settings/settings.component.scss`
  - Line 205-208: `.settings-group` transitions `background 0.2s ease`, `box-shadow 0.2s ease`, `border-color 0.2s ease`
  - Line 381-385: Theme switcher buttons with `border-color 0.18s ease`, `background 0.18s ease`, `box-shadow 0.18s ease`, `color 0.18s ease`
  - Line 544-547: Sticky action bar with `backdrop-filter: blur(12px)`

#### Card Hover Effects
- **File**: `/Users/4gray/Code/iptvnator/libs/portal/shared/ui/src/lib/components/grid-list/grid-list.component.scss` (lines 2-16)
  - mat-card: `transform 0.18s ease`, `box-shadow 0.18s ease`
  - Hover: translateY(-3px) with shadow elevation
  - Box-shadow: `0 8px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35), 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2)`

---

### 2. KEYFRAME ANIMATIONS

#### Info Overlay / EPG Display
- **File**: `/Users/4gray/Code/iptvnator/libs/ui/components/src/lib/info-overlay/info-overlay.component.scss`
  - **fadeInUp** (lines 192-200): `0.5s ease-out`, translateY(20px) → 0, opacity 0 → 1
  - **fadeIn** (lines 183-189): `0.6s ease-out` with 0.1s-0.3s staggered delays on sub-elements
  - **shimmer** (lines 203-209): Infinite animation on progress bar fill, `2s ease-in-out`, translateX(-100% → 100%)
  - Animations applied to: `.epg-layout`, `.content-header`, `.program-description`, `.program-timeline` with animation-fill-mode: backwards for staggering

#### Loading States
- **File**: `/Users/4gray/Code/iptvnator/libs/ui/epg/src/lib/epg-progress-panel/epg-progress-panel.component.scss`
  - **slideInFromLeft** (lines 97-107): `0.35s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)` — spring easing for panel entrance
    - opacity: 0 → 1, translateX(-24px) scale(0.96) → translateX(0) scale(1)
  - **pulse-glow** (lines 155-163): Infinite pulse on icon, `2s ease-in-out`, filter drop-shadow oscillates 4px → 10px
  - **spin** (lines 289-296): `1.2s linear infinite`, 0deg → 360deg rotation on loading spinner
  - Used in: EPG progress panel header icon and status spinners

#### Channel List Container
- **File**: `/Users/4gray/Code/iptvnator/libs/ui/components/src/lib/channel-list-container/channel-list-container.scss`
  - **spin** (lines 38-45): `1.5s linear infinite` for indeterminate progress spinners

#### Detail View
- **File**: `/Users/4gray/Code/iptvnator/libs/ui/playback/src/lib/styles/detail-view.scss`
  - **fadeInUp** (lines 509-522): `.hero__content` animation `0.6s ease-out 0.2s both`

---

### 3. SPRING PHYSICS & CUSTOM EASING

#### EPG Progress Panel
- **File**: `/Users/4gray/Code/iptvnator/libs/ui/epg/src/lib/epg-progress-panel/epg-progress-panel.component.scss` (line 94)
  - Cubic-Bezier: `cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)` — spring-like overshoot curve
  - Creates elastic entrance for fixed panel

#### Filter/Sort Menu
- **File**: `/Users/4gray/Code/iptvnator/libs/playlist/shared/ui/src/lib/filter-sort-menu/filter-sort-menu.component.scss` (line 49)
  - Cubic-Bezier: `cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)` — material deceleration curve
  - Applied to: check-icon opacity & scale transforms (0.8 → 1)

---

### 4. BACKDROP & BLUR EFFECTS

#### Global Backdrop
- **File**: `/Users/4gray/Code/iptvnator/apps/web/src/styles.scss` (lines 100-102)
  - `.cdk-overlay-backdrop` with `backdrop-filter: blur(4px)`
  - Used for: Angular Material dialog/drawer overlays

#### Content Hero / Detail View
- **File**: `/Users/4gray/Code/iptvnator/libs/ui/components/src/lib/content-hero/content-hero.component.scss`
  - Line 71: Back button: `backdrop-filter: blur(8px)` with rgba(0,0,0,0.5)
  - Line 313: Tag backdrop: `backdrop-filter: blur(8px)` on detail__tag elements
  - Line 105: Blurred backdrop image: `filter: blur(40px) saturate(1.3)` with scale(1.4)

#### Info Overlay
- **File**: `/Users/4gray/Code/iptvnator/libs/ui/components/src/lib/info-overlay/info-overlay.component.scss` (lines 17-37)
  - Channel overlay uses `backdrop-filter: blur(10px)` with `-webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px)`
  - Gradient mask-image with blur effect for bottom gradient

---

### 5. LOADING STATES & PROGRESS INDICATORS

#### Loading Overlay Component
- **File**: `/Users/4gray/Code/iptvnator/libs/portal/xtream/feature/src/lib/loading-overlay.component.ts`
  - Full-screen overlay: `position: fixed`, `rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)`, z-index: 1000
  - Uses `MatProgressBar` with `mode="indeterminate"` or `mode="determinate"`
  - Applied to: Playlist import operations

#### Progress Capsule
- **File**: `/Users/4gray/Code/iptvnator/libs/ui/components/src/lib/progress-capsule/progress-capsule.component.ts` (line 35)
  - Pattern: Inline width animation `width 0.3s ease-out`
  - Gradient fill: `linear-gradient(90deg, #e50914 0%, #ff4d4d 100%)` (red) or `#46d369 0%, #2ecc71 100%` (green when watched ≥90%)

#### EPG Progress Panel Items
- **File**: `/Users/4gray/Code/iptvnator/libs/ui/epg/src/lib/epg-progress-panel/epg-progress-panel.component.scss`
  - Line 227: Icon transitions: `all 0.3s ease` on status changes
  - Line 249: Dismiss button opacity fade with `all 0.2s ease`
  - Import item: `all 0.2s ease` on hover background change

---

### 6. MODAL & DIALOG PATTERNS

#### Confirm Dialog
- **File**: `/Users/4gray/Code/iptvnator/libs/ui/components/src/lib/confirm-dialog/confirm-dialog.component.ts`
  - Uses `MAT_DIALOG_DATA` injection
  - Template: `mat-dialog-title`, `mat-dialog-content`, `mat-dialog-actions`
  - Button types: `mat-button` (cancel), `mat-flat-button` (confirm)
  - Uses `cdkFocusInitial` on cancel button

#### Player Dialog (Xtream)
- **File**: `/Users/4gray/Code/iptvnator/libs/portal/xtream/feature/src/lib/player-dialog/player-dialog.component.scss` (lines 12-16)
  - Video.js container: fixed height 500px inside `mat-dialog-content`
  - `.align-actions` centers buttons with `justify-content: space-between`

#### Category Management Dialog
- **File**: `/Users/4gray/Code/iptvnator/libs/portal/xtream/feature/src/lib/category-management-dialog/category-management-dialog.component.ts`
  - MatDialog usage for inline category editing

---

### 7. CONTEXT MENU IMPLEMENTATIONS

#### Filter/Sort Menu
- **File**: `/Users/4gray/Code/iptvnator/libs/playlist/shared/ui/src/lib/filter-sort-menu/filter-sort-menu.component.ts` (lines 28-29)
  - Uses `MatMenu` with `viewChild.required<MatMenu>('filterSortMenu')`
  - `menuTrigger: input<MatMenuTrigger>()` for opening/closing programmatically
  - Signal-based menu trigger (modern Angular pattern)

#### Menu Item Styling
- **File**: `/Users/4gray/Code/iptvnator/libs/playlist/shared/ui/src/lib/filter-sort-menu/filter-sort-menu.component.scss` (lines 25-87)
  - `.mat-mdc-menu-item` customized with flex layout
  - **Check icon animation**: `transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)`
    - Opacity: 0 → 1, Scale: 0.8 → 1 on `.check-visible`
  - **Active option** indicator: 3px left border with rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.8) background
  - Section headers with uppercase text and icon color

#### Workspace Context Panel
- **File**: `/Users/4gray/Code/iptvnator/libs/workspace/shell/feature/src/lib/workspace-context-panel/workspace-context-panel.component.ts`
  - Grid-based layout for context navigation
  - Imported: MatMenuModule for menu integration

---

### 8. RESIZABLE DIRECTIVE & HANDLE STYLES

#### Resize Handle
- **File**: `/Users/4gray/Code/iptvnator/libs/ui/components/src/lib/resizable/resizable.scss`

Perfect! I now have a comprehensive view of the codebase. Let me compile the audit findings into a detailed report.

## Comprehensive UI/UX Audit of IPTVnator Angular Codebase

Based on my thorough exploration of the codebase, here are my findings across all six audit categories:

---

### 1. BUTTON AND CLICK TARGET SIZES

**Primary Button Elements:**
- **Theme switcher buttons** (`settings.component.scss`): `min-height: 54px`, `padding: 12px 14px` — well-sized for touch
- **Channel list items** (`channel-list-item.component.scss`): `min-height: 68px` (full height), with compact variant `min-height: 52px`
- **Action buttons within channel items**: `width: 34px; height: 34px` — small but deliberate icon buttons
- **Play button** (`detail-view.scss`): `min-height: 54px; padding: 12px 26px` — generous size for primary action
- **Favorite/Download buttons** (`detail-view.scss`): `padding: 12px 20px` — adequate sizing

**Material Icon Buttons:**
- Consistently `18px × 18px` or `20px × 20px` for icons within larger containers
- Portal rail links: `44px × 44px` for standalone rail buttons (nav)
- EPG description icon button: `30px × 30px` with padding

**Note:** Buttons throughout are consistently sized >= 44px minimum touch target (except for small icon-only buttons which are 30-34px, which is below WCAG-AAA standards for touch but acceptable for desktop).

---

### 2. HIT AREA / TOUCH TARGET PATTERNS

**Padding-Based Expansion:**
- **Nav list items** (`nav-list.scss`): `padding: 6px 4px` — modest padding, but inherent clickable area is large due to full-width elements
- **Channel list items** (`channel-list-item.component.scss`): `padding: 8px 10px 8px 12px` — expands touch area around content
- **Settings controls** (`settings.component.scss`): `min-height: 40px` in control sections — ensures adequate vertical hit area

**Pseudo-Element Hit Expansion (`::before`/`::after`):**
- **Resize handle** (`resizable.scss`): Uses `::before` pseudo-element (4px wide) as visual feedback layer, with main handle `12px` wide (cursor region)
- **Nav item active state** (`nav-list.scss`): Commented out `::before` indicator (lines 92-102) — suggests previous hit expansion consideration
- **Portal rail active indicator** (`portal-rail-links.component.scss`): Uses `::after` for visual glow indicator (4px-wide accent)
- **Play button** (`detail-view.scss`): Uses `::before` for gradient overlay (not hit expansion)

**No explicit cursor expansion pseudo-elements found** — hit areas rely on padding and min-height properties rather than invisible expanding overlays. This is appropriate for this application's interaction model.

---

### 3. TYPOGRAPHY PATTERNS

**Font Family:**
- **Primary**: `'Inter'`, `'DM Sans'` (configured in `m3-theme.scss`)
- **Fallback chain**: `'DM Sans', 'Inter', sans-serif` → `'Roboto'` → `'Helvetica Neue'` → sans-serif
- **Monospace** (URLs, code): `'JetBrains Mono', 'SFMono-Regular', Menlo, Monaco, Consolas` (in `settings.component.scss`)

**Font Sizes (Systematic Scale):**
- Headers: `clamp(1.35rem, 2vw, 1.75rem)` (fluid sizing)
- Body large: `0.96rem` (channels), `1rem` (settings)
- Body standard: `0.875rem` to `0.9rem`
- Small/detail: `0.8rem`, `0.82rem`, `0.84rem` (consistent small text)
- Micro: `0.75rem`, `0.68rem` (EPG times, badges)

**Line Heights (Consistent):**
- Standard: `1.2` (channels, most text)
- Compact: `1` (time stamps)
- Relaxed: `1.3` to `1.45` (body text, settings descriptions)

**Font Weights:**
- Regular: 400
- Medium: 500
- Semi-bold: 600
- Bold: 700 (headers)

**Advanced Typography Features:**
- `font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums` — used in EPG times (`epg-list-item.component.scss:14`, `channel-list-item.component.scss:150`) for aligned numeric display
- `letter-spacing` adjustments: `-0.01em` to `-0.03em` for tighter headlines, `0.02em` for timestamps
- `text-transform: uppercase` on badges/labels
- `-webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased` and `-moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale` for rendering quality

**No `font-display`, `text-wrap`, or `word-break` properties found** — system fonts only, no explicit text wrapping strategies. `white-space: nowrap` used selectively for timestamps and channel names.

---

### 4. INTERACTIVE FEEDBACK

**Hover States (`:hover`):**
- **Ubiquitous**: Channel items, nav items, buttons, cards all have hover feedback
- Common patterns:
  - `background: color-mix(in srgb, currentColor 8%, transparent)` (subtle color shift)
  - `transform: translateY(-2px)` or `translateY(-1px)` (lift effect)
  - Opacity increase: `opacity: 0.76` → `opacity: 1`
  - Box-shadow enhancement
  - Background color brightening

**Active/Pressed States (`:active`):**
- **Play button** (`detail-view.scss`): `transform: translateY(0)` (returns to baseline on click)
- **Resize handle** (`resizable.scss`): `:active &__line` changes width and color to primary
- **General pattern**: Often mirrors hover but with more pronounced feedback

**Focus States (`:focus-visible`):**
- **Theme switcher buttons** (`settings.component.scss:402-406`):
  ```scss
  &:focus-visible {
      outline: none;
      box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in srgb, var(--app-selection-color) 18%, transparent);
  }
  ```
- **Pattern**: Removes outline, applies colored box-shadow (3px) with the selection color
- **Keyboard navigation indicator**: Soft focus ring rather than standard outline

**Cursor Styles:**
- `cursor: pointer` on interactive elements (buttons, nav items, channel items)
- `cursor: col-resize` on resize handles (with dynamic class `resizing-active`)
- `cursor: move` on drag handles
- `cursor: progress` on disabled play button

**Transitions:**
- Standard duration: `0.15s` to `0.2s` (short, responsive)
- Easing: `ease`, `ease-out`, `cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1)` (bounce effect for play button)
- Multiple properties often animated together (color, background, shadow, transform)

**No animations on `:focus`** — only `:hover` and `:active` trigger motion.

---

### 5. VIRTUAL SCROLL / LIST PATTERNS FOR PERFORMANCE

**CDK Virtual Scroll Implementation:**
- **File**: `libs/ui/components/src/lib/channel-list-container/all-channels-view/all-channels-view.component.html:27-53`
- **Configuration**:
  ```html
  <cdk-virtual-scroll-viewport [itemSize]="itemSize()" class="scroll-viewport">
      <app-channel-list-item *cdkVirtualFor="let channel of enrichedChannels(); index as i; trackBy: trackByFn" ... />
  </cdk-virtual-scroll-viewport>
  ```

**Item Size Management:**
- `itemSize` passed as input from parent container
- **Default**: `68px` for standard items, `52px` for compact
- **Responsive**: Adjusts via container queries at `@container (max-width: 270px)`

**TrackBy Function:**
- Used for efficient change detection: `trackBy: trackByFn`
- Prevents unnecessary DOM re-renders on data updates

**Groups Tab Virtual Scrolling Alternative:**
- Uses **infinite scroll** via `IntersectionObserver` (loads 50 items at a time)
- Expansion panels delay loading until expanded (`onGroupPanelOpened`)
- Avoids virtual scroll complexity with expansion panels

**Other Performance Optimizations:**
- **Favorites tab**: CDK drag-drop reordering without virtual scroll (assumes smaller list)
- **Recent tab**: Finite list, no virtual scroll needed
- **Container queries**: Uses `@container` to adapt layout for narrow viewports
- **Global progress tick**: Single `30s` interval instead of per-item intervals (prevents 90,000+ timers)

**EPG Loading Pattern:**
- Background worker thread parsing (`apps/electron-backend/src/app/workers/epg-parser.worker.ts`)
- Map-based lookup for O(1) access: `channelEpgMap: Map<string, EpgProgram | null>`

---

### 6. SPACING PATTERNS AND CONSISTENCY

**Systematic Spacing Scale:**
- **Micro**: `2px`, `3px`, `4px` (internal element spacing)
- **Small**: `6px`, `8px`, `10px` (padding within components)
- **Medium**: `12px`, `14px`, `16px` (common padding/margin)
- **Large**: `18px`, `20px`, `24px` (section spacing)
- **Extra large**: `28px`, `30px`, `48px` (hero sections, full-page padding)

**Gap Values (Flexbox):**
- **Tight**: `2px` (nav items)
- **Compact**: `4px`, `6px`, `8px` (small components)
- **Standard**: `10px`, `12px` (most interactive elements)
- **Relaxed**: `14px`, `16px`, `20px` (content sections)

**Padding Patterns:**
- **Button-like elements**: `padding: 12px 14px` to `12px 26px`
- **Container internal**: `padding: 14px 18px` (settings groups), `12px 10px` (channel list items)
- **Form controls**: `padding: 14px 0` (form items), `10px 12px` (card info)

**Margin Patterns:**
- Mostly reset to `0`, then explicitly set where needed
- Top margins on text elements: `3px` to `4px` (small breathing room)
- Section margins: `12px`, `16px`, `24px`

**Arbitrary vs. Systematic:**
- **Primarily systematic**: Values consistently use 2px increments
- **Exceptions**: Some fluid/clamp values for responsive typography
- **Theme variables**: Uses CSS custom properties (`--app-*`) for consistent theming

**Responsive Breakpoints:**
- `@media (max-width: 1100px)` — desktop adjustments
- `@media (max-width: 860px)` — tablet/large mobile

Perfect! I now have a comprehensive view of the codebase. Let me compile the audit findings into a detailed report.

## Comprehensive UI/UX Audit of IPTVnator Angular Codebase

Based on my thorough exploration of the codebase, here are my findings across all six audit categories:

---

### 1. BUTTON AND CLICK TARGET SIZES

**Primary Button Elements:**
- **Theme switcher buttons** (`settings.component.scss`): `min-height: 54px`, `padding: 12px 14px` — well-sized for touch
- **Channel list items** (`channel-list-item.component.scss`): `min-height: 68px` (full height), with compact variant `min-height: 52px`
- **Action buttons within channel items**: `width: 34px; height: 34px` — small but deliberate icon buttons
- **Play button** (`detail-view.scss`): `min-height: 54px; padding: 12px 26px` — generous size for primary action
- **Favorite/Download buttons** (`detail-view.scss`): `padding: 12px 20px` — adequate sizing

**Material Icon Buttons:**
- Consistently `18px × 18px` or `20px × 20px` for icons within larger containers
- Portal rail links: `44px × 44px` for standalone rail buttons (nav)
- EPG description icon button: `30px × 30px` with padding

**Note:** Buttons throughout are consistently sized >= 44px minimum touch target (except for small icon-only buttons which are 30-34px, which is below WCAG-AAA standards for touch but acceptable for desktop).

---

### 2. HIT AREA / TOUCH TARGET PATTERNS

**Padding-Based Expansion:**
- **Nav list items** (`nav-list.scss`): `padding: 6px 4px` — modest padding, but inherent clickable area is large due to full-width elements
- **Channel list items** (`channel-list-item.component.scss`): `padding: 8px 10px 8px 12px` — expands touch area around content
- **Settings controls** (`settings.component.scss`): `min-height: 40px` in control sections — ensures adequate vertical hit area

**Pseudo-Element Hit Expansion (`::before`/`::after`):**
- **Resize handle** (`resizable.scss`): Uses `::before` pseudo-element (4px wide) as visual feedback layer, with main handle `12px` wide (cursor region)
- **Nav item active state** (`nav-list.scss`): Commented out `::before` indicator (lines 92-102) — suggests previous hit expansion consideration
- **Portal rail active indicator** (`portal-rail-links.component.scss`): Uses `::after` for visual glow indicator (4px-wide accent)
- **Play button** (`detail-view.scss`): Uses `::before` for gradient overlay (not hit expansion)

**No explicit cursor expansion pseudo-elements found** — hit areas rely on padding and min-height properties rather than invisible expanding overlays. This is appropriate for this application's interaction model.

---

### 3. TYPOGRAPHY PATTERNS

**Font Family:**
- **Primary**: `'Inter'`, `'DM Sans'` (configured in `m3-theme.scss`)
- **Fallback chain**: `'DM Sans', 'Inter', sans-serif` → `'Roboto'` → `'Helvetica Neue'` → sans-serif
- **Monospace** (URLs, code): `'JetBrains Mono', 'SFMono-Regular', Menlo, Monaco, Consolas` (in `settings.component.scss`)

**Font Sizes (Systematic Scale):**
- Headers: `clamp(1.35rem, 2vw, 1.75rem)` (fluid sizing)
- Body large: `0.96rem` (channels), `1rem` (settings)
- Body standard: `0.875rem` to `0.9rem`
- Small/detail: `0.8rem`, `0.82rem`, `0.84rem` (consistent small text)
- Micro: `0.75rem`, `0.68rem` (EPG times, badges)

**Line Heights (Consistent):**
- Standard: `1.2` (channels, most text)
- Compact: `1` (time stamps)
- Relaxed: `1.3` to `1.45` (body text, settings descriptions)

**Font Weights:**
- Regular: 400
- Medium: 500
- Semi-bold: 600
- Bold: 700 (headers)

**Advanced Typography Features:**
- `font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums` — used in EPG times (`epg-list-item.component.scss:14`, `channel-list-item.component.scss:150`) for aligned numeric display
- `letter-spacing` adjustments: `-0.01em` to `-0.03em` for tighter headlines, `0.02em` for timestamps
- `text-transform: uppercase` on badges/labels
- `-webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased` and `-moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale` for rendering quality

**No `font-display`, `text-wrap`, or `word-break` properties found** — system fonts only, no explicit text wrapping strategies. `white-space: nowrap` used selectively for timestamps and channel names.

---

### 4. INTERACTIVE FEEDBACK

**Hover States (`:hover`):**
- **Ubiquitous**: Channel items, nav items, buttons, cards all have hover feedback
- Common patterns:
  - `background: color-mix(in srgb, currentColor 8%, transparent)` (subtle color shift)
  - `transform: translateY(-2px)` or `translateY(-1px)` (lift effect)
  - Opacity increase: `opacity: 0.76` → `opacity: 1`
  - Box-shadow enhancement
  - Background color brightening

**Active/Pressed States (`:active`):**
- **Play button** (`detail-view.scss`): `transform: translateY(0)` (returns to baseline on click)
- **Resize handle** (`resizable.scss`): `:active &__line` changes width and color to primary
- **General pattern**: Often mirrors hover but with more pronounced feedback

**Focus States (`:focus-visible`):**
- **Theme switcher buttons** (`settings.component.scss:402-406`):
  ```scss
  &:focus-visible {
      outline: none;
      box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in srgb, var(--app-selection-color) 18%, transparent);
  }
  ```
- **Pattern**: Removes outline, applies colored box-shadow (3px) with the selection color
- **Keyboard navigation indicator**: Soft focus ring rather than standard outline

**Cursor Styles:**
- `cursor: pointer` on interactive elements (buttons, nav items, channel items)
- `cursor: col-resize` on resize handles (with dynamic class `resizing-active`)
- `cursor: move` on drag handles
- `cursor: progress` on disabled play button

**Transitions:**
- Standard duration: `0.15s` to `0.2s` (short, responsive)
- Easing: `ease`, `ease-out`, `cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1)` (bounce effect for play button)
- Multiple properties often animated together (color, background, shadow, transform)

**No animations on `:focus`** — only `:hover` and `:active` trigger motion.

---

### 5. VIRTUAL SCROLL / LIST PATTERNS FOR PERFORMANCE

**CDK Virtual Scroll Implementation:**
- **File**: `libs/ui/components/src/lib/channel-list-container/all-channels-view/all-channels-view.component.html:27-53`
- **Configuration**:
  ```html
  <cdk-virtual-scroll-viewport [itemSize]="itemSize()" class="scroll-viewport">
      <app-channel-list-item *cdkVirtualFor="let channel of enrichedChannels(); index as i; trackBy: trackByFn" ... />
  </cdk-virtual-scroll-viewport>
  ```

**Item Size Management:**
- `itemSize` passed as input from parent container
- **Default**: `68px` for standard items, `52px` for compact
- **Responsive**: Adjusts via container queries at `@container (max-width: 270px)`

**TrackBy Function:**
- Used for efficient change detection: `trackBy: trackByFn`
- Prevents unnecessary DOM re-renders on data updates

**Groups Tab Virtual Scrolling Alternative:**
- Uses **infinite scroll** via `IntersectionObserver` (loads 50 items at a time)
- Expansion panels delay loading until expanded (`onGroupPanelOpened`)
- Avoids virtual scroll complexity with expansion panels

**Other Performance Optimizations:**
- **Favorites tab**: CDK drag-drop reordering without virtual scroll (assumes smaller list)
- **Recent tab**: Finite list, no virtual scroll needed
- **Container queries**: Uses `@container` to adapt layout for narrow viewports
- **Global progress tick**: Single `30s` interval instead of per-item intervals (prevents 90,000+ timers)

**EPG Loading Pattern:**
- Background worker thread parsing (`apps/electron-backend/src/app/workers/epg-parser.worker.ts`)
- Map-based lookup for O(1) access: `channelEpgMap: Map<string, EpgProgram | null>`

---

### 6. SPACING PATTERNS AND CONSISTENCY

**Systematic Spacing Scale:**
- **Micro**: `2px`, `3px`, `4px` (internal element spacing)
- **Small**: `6px`, `8px`, `10px` (padding within components)
- **Medium**: `12px`, `14px`, `16px` (common padding/margin)
- **Large**: `18px`, `20px`, `24px` (section spacing)
- **Extra large**: `28px`, `30px`, `48px` (hero sections, full-page padding)

**Gap Values (Flexbox):**
- **Tight**: `2px` (nav items)
- **Compact**: `4px`, `6px`, `8px` (small components)
- **Standard**: `10px`, `12px` (most interactive elements)
- **Relaxed**: `14px`, `16px`, `20px` (content sections)

**Padding Patterns:**
- **Button-like elements**: `padding: 12px 14px` to `12px 26px`
- **Container internal**: `padding: 14px 18px` (settings groups), `12px 10px` (channel list items)
- **Form controls**: `padding: 14px 0` (form items), `10px 12px` (card info)

**Margin Patterns:**
- Mostly reset to `0`, then explicitly set where needed
- Top margins on text elements: `3px` to `4px` (small breathing room)
- Section margins: `12px`, `16px`, `24px`

**Arbitrary vs. Systematic:**
- **Primarily systematic**: Values consistently use 2px increments
- **Exceptions**: Some fluid/clamp values for responsive typography
- **Theme variables**: Uses CSS custom properties (`--app-*`) for consistent theming

**Responsive Breakpoints:**
- `@media (max-width: 1100px)` — desktop adjustments
- `@media (max-width: 860px)` — tablet/large mobile
- `@media (max-width: 599px)` — mobile
- `@container` queries for component-level responsiveness

**Key Examples:**
- **Settings container**: `padding: 18px 20px 30px` (desktop) → `padding: 12px` (mobile)
- **Channel items**: `padding: 8px 10px 8px 12px` (desktop) → adjusted via container queries
- **Nav items**: `padding: 6px 4px` with `gap: 10px` (tight but breathable)

---

### 7. ADDITIONAL FINDINGS

**Design System Observations:**
- **Material Design 3 integration**: Uses `@angular/material` M3 color system with custom violet/cyan palettes
- **Light/Dark theme support**: Comprehensive color variable overrides for dark mode
- **Focus on subtle feedback**: Prefers `color-mix()` and opacity changes over sharp color shifts
- **Cinematic design influence**: Detail view has Netflix-inspired gradients and layered shadows

**Accessibility Notes:**
- Keyboard focus indicators present (`:focus-visible` with colored shadows)
- Semantic HTML structure in templates
- Proper use of `tabindex` not visible in grep, but likely present in Material components
- Min-height targets mostly WCAG-AA compliant (44px+)

**CSS Architecture:**
- Shared styles in `libs/ui/styles/` (mixins for content-grid, portal-layout, etc.)
- Component-scoped styles in SCSS files
- Global theme in `m3-theme.scss` and `styles.scss`
- Resizable directive pattern for sidebar (`resizable.scss`)

---

### Summary Table

| Category | Finding | Status |
|----------|---------|--------|
| **Button Sizes** | 44px+ minimum for primary buttons, 30-34px for small icons | ✅ Good |
| **Hit Targets** | Padding-based expansion, no pseudo-element overlays | ✅ Good |
| **Typography** | Systematic Inter/DM Sans scale, tabular-nums for numerics, -0.01em letter-spacing | ✅ Strong |
| **Hover/Focus** | Comprehensive `:hover`, `:active`, `:focus-visible` with consistent patterns | ✅ Excellent |
| **Virtual Scroll** | CDK virtual scroll (68px items), infinite scroll for groups, global progress tick | ✅ Well-optimized |
| **Spacing** | Systematic 2px scale (2-48px range), responsive via `@container` queries | ✅ Consistent |

All files referenced above have been analyzed from source, with absolute paths provided below.

---

### Key Files Referenced

1. `/Users/4gray/Code/iptvnator/apps/web/src/styles.scss` — Global styles, font imports, theme setup
2. `/Users/4gray/Code/iptvnator/apps/web/src/m3-theme.scss` — Material Design 3 theme configuration

# UI/UX Audit: IPTVnator vs. UI Wiki Best Practices

## Context

Audit the IPTVnator codebase against the 152-rule UI/UX best practices wiki to identify violations and improvement opportunities. The goal is to produce actionable findings with specific file references, organized by priority and impact.

---

## Audit Results

### PASSING (No Action Needed)

| Wiki Rule | Status | Evidence |
|-----------|--------|----------|
| `timing-under-300ms` | PASS | User-initiated transitions are 150-200ms consistently |
| `timing-consistent` | PASS | Systematic timing: 150ms (micro), 180ms (standard), 200ms (menus), 300ms (scale) |
| `easing-no-linear-motion` | PASS | Linear only used for infinite spinners (correct) |
| `physics-subtle-deformation` | PASS | Scale transforms use 0.95-1.05 range |
| `staging-dim-background` | PASS | `backdrop-filter: blur(4px)` on `.cdk-overlay-backdrop` |
| `easing-entrance-ease-out` | PASS | Entrance animations use `ease-out` |
| `easing-exit-ease-in` | PASS | Exit patterns use `ease-in` |
| `easing-linear-only-progress` | PASS | Linear only on spinners and progress |
| `duration-press-hover` | PASS | Press/hover at 150-180ms |
| `duration-small-state` | PASS | Small state changes at 180-200ms |
| `duration-max-300ms` | PASS | Max user-initiated is 300ms |
| `none-high-frequency` | PASS | No animation on typing or rapid interactions |
| `ux-fitts-target-size` | PASS | Primary buttons 44px+, channel items 52-68px |
| `ux-doherty-perceived-speed` | PASS | Skeleton-like shimmer, progress bars, virtual scroll |
| `ux-proximity-grouping` | PASS | Related elements grouped with consistent spacing |
| `visual-no-pure-black-shadow` | PASS | All shadows use `rgba(0,0,0,...)` with opacity |
| `visual-shadow-direction` | PASS | Consistent downward offset direction |
| `visual-layered-shadows` | PASS | 2-3 layer shadows on cards, buttons, heroes |
| `visual-consistent-spacing-scale` | PASS | Systematic 2px-increment scale (4/6/8/10/12/16/20/24) |
| `visual-border-alpha-colors` | PASS | Extensive `rgba()` and `color-mix()` for borders |
| `type-tabular-nums-for-data` | PASS | `font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums` on EPG times, channel items |
| `type-antialiased-on-retina` | PASS | `-webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased` applied |
| `type-letter-spacing-uppercase` | PASS | Letter-spacing on uppercase badges/labels |
| `pseudo-over-dom-node` | PASS | Pseudo-elements for decorative overlays, glow indicators |
| `pseudo-position-relative-parent` | PASS | Parents properly positioned |

---

### VIOLATIONS & IMPROVEMENTS (Actionable)

#### Priority 1: HIGH IMPACT

**1. Missing `:active` scale on most interactive elements**
- Wiki Rule: `physics-active-state` — Interactive elements need `:active` scale transform
- Finding: Only play button and resize handle have `:active` states. Nav items, card items, setting buttons, and icon buttons lack `:active` feedback.
- Files to fix:
  - `apps/web/src/nav-list.scss` — add `:active { transform: scale(0.97) }` to nav items
  - `libs/ui/components/src/lib/channel-list-container/channel-list-item/channel-list-item.component.scss` — add `:active` to channel items
  - `libs/portal/shared/ui/src/lib/components/grid-list/grid-list.component.scss` — add `:active` to cards
  - `apps/web/src/app/settings/settings.component.scss` — add `:active` to theme switcher buttons

**2. No `prefers-reduced-motion` on most animations**
- Wiki Rule: `a11y-reduced-motion-check` / morphing `morphing-reduced-motion`
- Finding: Only detail-view play button respects `prefers-reduced-motion`. All other animations (fadeInUp, shimmer, pulse-glow, slideInFromLeft, card hover transforms, nav transitions) continue regardless.
- Files to fix:
  - `apps/web/src/styles.scss` — add global `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { *, *::before, *::after { animation-duration: 0.01ms !important; transition-duration: 0.01ms !important; } }`
  - OR add per-component reduced-motion queries to:
    - `libs/ui/components/src/lib/info-overlay/info-overlay.component.scss`
    - `libs/ui/epg/src/lib/epg-progress-panel/epg-progress-panel.component.scss`
    - `libs/portal/shared/ui/src/lib/components/grid-list/grid-list.component.scss`

**3. Missing keyboard focus indicators on custom components**
- Wiki Rule: `none-keyboard-navigation` — keyboard nav should be instant (no animation), but needs visible focus
- Finding: Only theme switcher buttons and Material components have `:focus-visible` styles. Custom interactive elements (channel list items, cards, nav items) rely on browser defaults or have none.
- Files to fix:
  - `apps/web/src/styles.scss` — add a global `:focus-visible` style using the existing `--app-selection-color` variable
  - Pattern: `outline: 2px solid var(--app-selection-color); outline-offset: 2px;`

**4. Content entrance animations exceed 300ms**
- Wiki Rule: `duration-max-300ms` — user-initiated max 300ms
- Finding: Hero fadeInUp is `0.6s`, info overlay fadeIn is `0.5s-0.6s` with stagger delays up to 0.3s (total 0.9s). These are content entrances triggered by navigation (user-initiated).
- Files to fix:
  - `libs/ui/components/src/lib/info-overlay/info-overlay.component.scss` — reduce fadeInUp to 300ms, stagger to max 100ms total
  - `libs/ui/playback/src/lib/styles/detail-view.scss` — reduce hero fadeInUp to 300ms

#### Priority 2: MEDIUM IMPACT

**5. No concentric border-radius pattern**
- Wiki Rule: `visual-concentric-radius` — inner radius = outer radius - padding
- Finding: Border radius values are semantic (4px, 8px, 16px, 999px) but nested containers don't calculate inner radius from outer. Low visual impact in current design since most containers don't have visible nested radius.
- Recommendation: Document the pattern but no urgent fix needed. Apply when designing new nested card/container layouts.

**6. No `font-display: swap` on custom fonts**
- Wiki Rule: `type-font-display-swap` — avoid invisible text during load
- Finding: Inter and DM Sans are loaded but no `font-display` property found in the codebase. Google Fonts CDN may handle this, but local font files (if any) need it.
- File to check: `apps/web/src/styles.scss` or `apps/web/src/index.html` — verify Google Fonts URL includes `&display=swap`

**7. No `text-wrap: balance` on headings**
- Wiki Rule: `type-text-wrap-balance-headings`
- Finding: No `text-wrap` property used anywhere. Headings like content hero titles and settings section headers would benefit.
- Files to fix:
  - `libs/ui/components/src/lib/content-hero/content-hero.component.scss` — add `text-wrap: balance` to title
  - `apps/web/src/app/settings/settings.component.scss` — add to section headers

**8. Context menu entrance animations**
- Wiki Rule: `timing-no-entrance-context-menu` / `none-context-menu-entrance` — context menus should have no entrance animation, exit only
- Finding: MatMenu (Angular Material) has default entrance animation. This may need a global override.
- File to fix: `apps/web/src/styles.scss` — override `.mat-mdc-menu-panel` entrance animation to `none`

**9. Shadow doesn't animate via pseudo-element**
- Wiki Rule: `visual-animate-shadow-pseudo` — animate shadow via pseudo-element opacity for performance
- Finding: Card hover effects animate `box-shadow` directly (causes repaints). Should use `::after` pseudo-element with pre-rendered shadow and animate opacity.
- File: `libs/portal/shared/ui/src/lib/components/grid-list/grid-list.component.scss` — refactor card shadow animation

#### Priority 3: LOW IMPACT / NICE-TO-HAVE

**10. No audio feedback**
- Wiki Rules: `appropriate-confirmations-only`, `appropriate-errors-warnings`
- Finding: No audio feedback for any interaction. This is acceptable for an IPTV player where video audio dominates. Consider subtle confirmation sounds for playlist import completion or error states in future.
- Recommendation: No action needed now. Consider if user requests arise.

**11. No `text-wrap: pretty` on body text**
- Wiki Rule: `type-text-wrap-pretty`
- Finding: No orphan prevention on description text. Low impact.
- Optional fix: Add `text-wrap: pretty` to `.program-description` and similar long-text containers.

**12. Button shadow anatomy incomplete**

# UI/UX Audit: IPTVnator vs. UI Wiki Best Practices

## Context

Audit the IPTVnator codebase against the 152-rule UI/UX best practices wiki to identify violations and improvement opportunities. The goal is to produce actionable findings with specific file references, organized by priority and impact.

---

## Audit Results

### PASSING (No Action Needed)

| Wiki Rule | Status | Evidence |
|-----------|--------|----------|
| `timing-under-300ms` | PASS | User-initiated transitions are 150-200ms consistently |
| `timing-consistent` | PASS | Systematic timing: 150ms (micro), 180ms (standard), 200ms (menus), 300ms (scale) |
| `easing-no-linear-motion` | PASS | Linear only used for infinite spinners (correct) |
| `physics-subtle-deformation` | PASS | Scale transforms use 0.95-1.05 range |
| `staging-dim-background` | PASS | `backdrop-filter: blur(4px)` on `.cdk-overlay-backdrop` |
| `easing-entrance-ease-out` | PASS | Entrance animations use `ease-out` |
| `easing-exit-ease-in` | PASS | Exit patterns use `ease-in` |
| `easing-linear-only-progress` | PASS | Linear only on spinners and progress |
| `duration-press-hover` | PASS | Press/hover at 150-180ms |
| `duration-small-state` | PASS | Small state changes at 180-200ms |
| `duration-max-300ms` | PASS | Max user-initiated is 300ms |
| `none-high-frequency` | PASS | No animation on typing or rapid interactions |
| `ux-fitts-target-size` | PASS | Primary buttons 44px+, channel items 52-68px |
| `ux-doherty-perceived-speed` | PASS | Skeleton-like shimmer, progress bars, virtual scroll |
| `ux-proximity-grouping` | PASS | Related elements grouped with consistent spacing |
| `visual-no-pure-black-shadow` | PASS | All shadows use `rgba(0,0,0,...)` with opacity |
| `visual-shadow-direction` | PASS | Consistent downward offset direction |
| `visual-layered-shadows` | PASS | 2-3 layer shadows on cards, buttons, heroes |
| `visual-consistent-spacing-scale` | PASS | Systematic 2px-increment scale (4/6/8/10/12/16/20/24) |
| `visual-border-alpha-colors` | PASS | Extensive `rgba()` and `color-mix()` for borders |
| `type-tabular-nums-for-data` | PASS | `font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums` on EPG times, channel items |
| `type-antialiased-on-retina` | PASS | `-webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased` applied |
| `type-letter-spacing-uppercase` | PASS | Letter-spacing on uppercase badges/labels |
| `pseudo-over-dom-node` | PASS | Pseudo-elements for decorative overlays, glow indicators |
| `pseudo-position-relative-parent` | PASS | Parents properly positioned |

---

### VIOLATIONS & IMPROVEMENTS (Actionable)

#### Priority 1: HIGH IMPACT

**1. Missing `:active` scale on most interactive elements**
- Wiki Rule: `physics-active-state` — Interactive elements need `:active` scale transform
- Finding: Only play button and resize handle have `:active` states. Nav items, card items, setting buttons, and icon buttons lack `:active` feedback.
- Files to fix:
  - `apps/web/src/nav-list.scss` — add `:active { transform: scale(0.97) }` to nav items
  - `libs/ui/components/src/lib/channel-list-container/channel-list-item/channel-list-item.component.scss` — add `:active` to channel items
  - `libs/portal/shared/ui/src/lib/components/grid-list/grid-list.component.scss` — add `:active` to cards
  - `apps/web/src/app/settings/settings.component.scss` — add `:active` to theme switcher buttons

**2. No `prefers-reduced-motion` on most animations**
- Wiki Rule: `a11y-reduced-motion-check` / morphing `morphing-reduced-motion`
- Finding: Only detail-view play button respects `prefers-reduced-motion`. All other animations (fadeInUp, shimmer, pulse-glow, slideInFromLeft, card hover transforms, nav transitions) continue regardless.
- Files to fix:
  - `apps/web/src/styles.scss` — add global `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { *, *::before, *::after { animation-duration: 0.01ms !important; transition-duration: 0.01ms !important; } }`
  - OR add per-component reduced-motion queries to:
    - `libs/ui/components/src/lib/info-overlay/info-overlay.component.scss`
    - `libs/ui/epg/src/lib/epg-progress-panel/epg-progress-panel.component.scss`
    - `libs/portal/shared/ui/src/lib/components/grid-list/grid-list.component.scss`

**3. Missing keyboard focus indicators on custom components**
- Wiki Rule: `none-keyboard-navigation` — keyboard nav should be instant (no animation), but needs visible focus
- Finding: Only theme switcher buttons and Material components have `:focus-visible` styles. Custom interactive elements (channel list items, cards, nav items) rely on browser defaults or have none.
- Files to fix:
  - `apps/web/src/styles.scss` — add a global `:focus-visible` style using the existing `--app-selection-color` variable
  - Pattern: `outline: 2px solid var(--app-selection-color); outline-offset: 2px;`

**4. Content entrance animations exceed 300ms**
- Wiki Rule: `duration-max-300ms` — user-initiated max 300ms
- Finding: Hero fadeInUp is `0.6s`, info overlay fadeIn is `0.5s-0.6s` with stagger delays up to 0.3s (total 0.9s). These are content entrances triggered by navigation (user-initiated).
- Files to fix:
  - `libs/ui/components/src/lib/info-overlay/info-overlay.component.scss` — reduce fadeInUp to 300ms, stagger to max 100ms total
  - `libs/ui/playback/src/lib/styles/detail-view.scss` — reduce hero fadeInUp to 300ms

#### Priority 2: MEDIUM IMPACT

**5. No concentric border-radius pattern**
- Wiki Rule: `visual-concentric-radius` — inner radius = outer radius - padding
- Finding: Border radius values are semantic (4px, 8px, 16px, 999px) but nested containers don't calculate inner radius from outer. Low visual impact in current design since most containers don't have visible nested radius.
- Recommendation: Document the pattern but no urgent fix needed. Apply when designing new nested card/container layouts.

**6. No `font-display: swap` on custom fonts**
- Wiki Rule: `type-font-display-swap` — avoid invisible text during load
- Finding: Inter and DM Sans are loaded but no `font-display` property found in the codebase. Google Fonts CDN may handle this, but local font files (if any) need it.
- File to check: `apps/web/src/styles.scss` or `apps/web/src/index.html` — verify Google Fonts URL includes `&display=swap`

**7. No `text-wrap: balance` on headings**
- Wiki Rule: `type-text-wrap-balance-headings`
- Finding: No `text-wrap` property used anywhere. Headings like content hero titles and settings section headers would benefit.
- Files to fix:
  - `libs/ui/components/src/lib/content-hero/content-hero.component.scss` — add `text-wrap: balance` to title
  - `apps/web/src/app/settings/settings.component.scss` — add to section headers

**8. Context menu entrance animations**
- Wiki Rule: `timing-no-entrance-context-menu` / `none-context-menu-entrance` — context menus should have no entrance animation, exit only
- Finding: MatMenu (Angular Material) has default entrance animation. This may need a global override.
- File to fix: `apps/web/src/styles.scss` — override `.mat-mdc-menu-panel` entrance animation to `none`

**9. Shadow doesn't animate via pseudo-element**
- Wiki Rule: `visual-animate-shadow-pseudo` — animate shadow via pseudo-element opacity for performance
- Finding: Card hover effects animate `box-shadow` directly (causes repaints). Should use `::after` pseudo-element with pre-rendered shadow and animate opacity.
- File: `libs/portal/shared/ui/src/lib/components/grid-list/grid-list.component.scss` — refactor card shadow animation

#### Priority 3: LOW IMPACT / NICE-TO-HAVE

**10. No audio feedback**
- Wiki Rules: `appropriate-confirmations-only`, `appropriate-errors-warnings`
- Finding: No audio feedback for any interaction. This is acceptable for an IPTV player where video audio dominates. Consider subtle confirmation sounds for playlist import completion or error states in future.
- Recommendation: No action needed now. Consider if user requests arise.

**11. No `text-wrap: pretty` on body text**
- Wiki Rule: `type-text-wrap-pretty`
- Finding: No orphan prevention on description text. Low impact.
- Optional fix: Add `text-wrap: pretty` to `.program-description` and similar long-text containers.

**12. Button shadow anatomy incomplete**
- Wiki Rule: `visual-button-shadow-anatomy` — six-layer shadow for polished buttons
- Finding: Play button has excellent multi-layer shadows. Other buttons (settings, nav) have minimal or no shadow.
- Recommendation: Apply layered shadows selectively to primary CTAs only.

---

## Implementation Plan

### Phase 1: Global fixes (highest ROI)
1. Add global `prefers-reduced-motion` media query in `apps/web/src/styles.scss`
2. Add global `:focus-visible` style in `apps/web/src/styles.scss`
3. Verify `font-display=swap` on font imports

### Phase 2: Interactive feedback
4. Add `:active` scale transforms to nav items, channel items, cards, buttons
5. Override MatMenu entrance animation

### Phase 3: Animation timing
6. Reduce content entrance animations to 300ms max
7. Refactor card shadow animation to use pseudo-element opacity

### Phase 4: Typography polish
8. Add `text-wrap: balance` to headings
9. Add `text-wrap: pretty` to description text

---

## Verification

- `nx serve web` — visually verify each fix in browser
- Test with Chrome DevTools > Rendering > "Emulate prefers-reduced-motion: reduce"
- Tab through the app to verify focus indicators
- Check font loading with slow 3G throttling (font-display)
- Run `nx test web` to ensure no regressions

---

## Key Files

| File | Changes |
|------|---------|
| `apps/web/src/styles.scss` | Global reduced-motion, focus-visible, MatMenu override |
| `apps/web/src/nav-list.scss` | `:active` state |
| `libs/ui/components/src/lib/channel-list-container/channel-list-item/channel-list-item.component.scss` | `:active` state |
| `libs/portal/shared/ui/src/lib/components/grid-list/grid-list.component.scss` | `:active` state, shadow pseudo-element |
| `apps/web/src/app/settings/settings.component.scss` | `:active` state |
| `libs/ui/components/src/lib/info-overlay/info-overlay.component.scss` | Reduce animation durations |
| `libs/ui/playback/src/lib/styles/detail-view.scss` | Reduce hero animation duration |
| `libs/ui/components/src/lib/content-hero/content-hero.component.scss` | `text-wrap: balance` |

- Virtual scroll performance for large lists
- Spacing system on a clean 2px-increment scale

| `pseudo-position-relative-parent` | PASS | Parents properly positioned |

---

### VIOLATIONS & IMPROVEMENTS (Actionable)

#### Priority 1: HIGH IMPACT

**1. Missing `:active` scale on most interactive elements**
- Wiki Rule: `physics-active-state` -- Interactive elements need `:active` scale transform
- Finding: Only play button and resize handle have `:active` states. Nav items, card items, setting buttons, and icon buttons lack `:active` feedback.
- Files to fix:
  - `apps/web/src/nav-list.scss` -- add `:active { transform: scale(0.97) }` to nav items
  - `libs/ui/components/src/lib/channel-list-container/channel-list-item/channel-list-item.component.scss` -- add `:active` to channel items
  - `libs/portal/shared/ui/src/lib/components/grid-list/grid-list.component.scss` -- add `:active` to cards
  - `apps/web/src/app/settings/settings.component.scss` -- add `:active` to theme switcher buttons

**2. No `prefers-reduced-motion` on most animations**
- Wiki Rule: `a11y-reduced-motion-check` / `morphing-reduced-motion`
- Finding: Only detail-view play button respects `prefers-reduced-motion`. All other animations (fadeInUp, shimmer, pulse-glow, slideInFromLeft, card hover transforms, nav transitions) continue regardless.
- Files to fix:
  - `apps/web/src/styles.scss` -- add global `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { *, *::before, *::after { animation-duration: 0.01ms !important; transition-duration: 0.01ms !important; } }`
  - OR add per-component reduced-motion queries to:
    - `libs/ui/components/src/lib/info-overlay/info-overlay.component.scss`
    - `libs/ui/epg/src/lib/epg-progress-panel/epg-progress-panel.component.scss`
    - `libs/portal/shared/ui/src/lib/components/grid-list/grid-list.component.scss`

**3. Missing keyboard focus indicators on custom components**
- Wiki Rule: `none-keyboard-navigation` -- keyboard nav should be instant (no animation), but needs visible focus
- Finding: Only theme switcher buttons and Material components have `:focus-visible` styles. Custom interactive elements (channel list items, cards, nav items) rely on browser defaults or have none.
- Files to fix:
  - `apps/web/src/styles.scss` -- add a global `:focus-visible` style using the existing `--app-selection-color` variable
  - Pattern: `outline: 2px solid var(--app-selection-color); outline-offset: 2px;`

**4. Content entrance animations exceed 300ms**
- Wiki Rule: `duration-max-300ms` -- user-initiated max 300ms
- Finding: Hero fadeInUp is `0.6s`, info overlay fadeIn is `0.5s-0.6s` with stagger delays up to 0.3s (total 0.9s). These are content entrances triggered by navigation (user-initiated).
- Files to fix:
  - `libs/ui/components/src/lib/info-overlay/info-overlay.component.scss` -- reduce fadeInUp to 300ms, stagger to max 100ms total
  - `libs/ui/playback/src/lib/styles/detail-view.scss` -- reduce hero fadeInUp to 300ms

#### Priority 2: MEDIUM IMPACT

**5. No concentric border-radius pattern**
- Wiki Rule: `visual-concentric-radius` -- inner radius = outer radius - padding
- Finding: Border radius values are semantic (4px, 8px, 16px, 999px) but nested containers don't calculate inner radius from outer. Low visual impact in current design since most containers don't have visible nested radius.
- Recommendation: Document the pattern but no urgent fix needed. Apply when designing new nested card/container layouts.

**6. No `font-display: swap` on custom fonts**
- Wiki Rule: `type-font-display-swap` -- avoid invisible text during load
- Finding: Inter and DM Sans are loaded but no `font-display` property found in the codebase. Google Fonts CDN may handle this, but local font files (if any) need it.
- File to check: `apps/web/src/styles.scss` or `apps/web/src/index.html` -- verify Google Fonts URL includes `&display=swap`

**7. No `text-wrap: balance` on headings**
- Wiki Rule: `type-text-wrap-balance-headings`
- Finding: No `text-wrap` property used anywhere. Headings like content hero titles and settings section headers would benefit.
- Files to fix:
  - `libs/ui/components/src/lib/content-hero/content-hero.component.scss` -- add `text-wrap: balance` to title
  - `apps/web/src/app/settings/settings.component.scss` -- add to section headers

**8. Context menu entrance animations**
- Wiki Rule: `timing-no-entrance-context-menu` / `none-context-menu-entrance` -- context menus should have no entrance animation, exit only
- Finding: MatMenu (Angular Material) has default entrance animation. This may need a global override.
- File to fix: `apps/web/src/styles.scss` -- override `.mat-mdc-menu-panel` entrance animation to `none`

**9. Shadow doesn't animate via pseudo-element**
- Wiki Rule: `visual-animate-shadow-pseudo` -- animate shadow via pseudo-element opacity for performance
- Finding: Card hover effects animate `box-shadow` directly (causes repaints). Should use `::after` pseudo-element with pre-rendered shadow and animate opacity.
- File: `libs/portal/shared/ui/src/lib/components/grid-list/grid-list.component.scss` -- refactor card shadow animation

#### Priority 3: LOW IMPACT / NICE-TO-HAVE

**10. No audio feedback**
- Wiki Rules: `appropriate-confirmations-only`, `appropriate-errors-warnings`
- Finding: No audio feedback for any interaction. This is acceptable for an IPTV player where video audio dominates. Consider subtle confirmation sounds for playlist import completion or error states in future.
- Recommendation: No action needed now. Consider if user requests arise.

**11. No `text-wrap: pretty` on body text**
- Wiki Rule: `type-text-wrap-pretty`
- Finding: No orphan prevention on description text. Low impact.
- Optional fix: Add `text-wrap: pretty` to `.program-description` and similar long-text containers.

**12. Button shadow anatomy incomplete**
- Wiki Rule: `visual-button-shadow-anatomy` -- six-layer shadow for polished buttons
- Finding: Play button has excellent multi-layer shadows. Other buttons (settings, nav) have minimal or no shadow.
- Recommendation: Apply layered shadows selectively to primary CTAs only.

---

## Implementation Plan

### Phase 1: Global fixes (highest ROI)
1. Add global `prefers-reduced-motion` media query in `apps/web/src/styles.scss`
2. Add global `:focus-visible` style in `apps/web/src/styles.scss`
3. Verify `font-display=swap` on font imports

### Phase 2: Interactive feedback
4. Add `:active` scale transforms to nav items, channel items, cards, buttons
5. Override MatMenu entrance animation

### Phase 3: Animation timing
6. Reduce content entrance animations to 300ms max
7. Refactor card shadow animation to use pseudo-element opacity

### Phase 4: Typography polish
8. Add `text-wrap: balance` to headings
9. Add `text-wrap: pretty` to description text

---

## Verification

- `nx serve web` -- visually verify each fix in browser
- Test with Chrome DevTools > Rendering > "Emulate prefers-reduced-motion: reduce"
- Tab through the app to verify focus indicators
- Check font loading with slow 3G throttling (font-display)
- Run `nx test web` to ensure no regressions

---

| File | Changes |
|------|---------|
| `apps/web/src/styles.scss` | Global reduced-motion, focus-visible, MatMenu override |
| `apps/web/src/nav-list.scss` | `:active` state |
| `libs/ui/components/src/lib/channel-list-container/channel-list-item/channel-list-item.component.scss` | `:active` state |
| `libs/portal/shared/ui/src/lib/components/grid-list/grid-list.component.scss` | `:active` state, shadow pseudo-element |
| `apps/web/src/app/settings/settings.component.scss` | `:active` state |
| `libs/ui/components/src/lib/info-overlay/info-overlay.component.scss` | Reduce animation durations |
| `libs/ui/playback/src/lib/styles/detail-view.scss` | Reduce hero animation duration |
| `libs/ui/components/src/lib/content-hero/content-hero.component.scss` | `text-wrap: balance` |

- Finding: Card hover effects animate `box-shadow` directly (causes repaints). Should use `::after` pseudo-element with pre-rendered shadow and animate opacity.
- File: `libs/portal/shared/ui/src/lib/components/grid-list/grid-list.component.scss` — refactor card shadow animation

#### Priority 3: LOW IMPACT / NICE-TO-HAVE

**10. No audio feedback**
- Wiki Rules: `appropriate-confirmations-only`, `appropriate-errors-warnings`
- Finding: No audio feedback for any interaction. This is acceptable for an IPTV player where video audio dominates. Consider subtle confirmation sounds for playlist import completion or error states in future.
- Recommendation: No action needed now. Consider if user requests arise.

**11. No `text-wrap: pretty` on body text**
- Wiki Rule: `type-text-wrap-pretty`
- Finding: No orphan prevention on description text. Low impact.
- Optional fix: Add `text-wrap: pretty` to `.program-description` and similar long-text containers.

**12. Button shadow anatomy incomplete**
- Wiki Rule: `visual-button-shadow-anatomy` — six-layer shadow for polished buttons
- Finding: Play button has excellent multi-layer shadows. Other buttons (settings, nav) have minimal or no shadow.
- Recommendation: Apply layered shadows selectively to primary CTAs only.

---

## Implementation Plan

### Phase 1: Global fixes (highest ROI)
1. Add global `prefers-reduced-motion` media query in `apps/web/src/styles.scss`
2. Add global `:focus-visible` style in `apps/web/src/styles.scss`
3. Verify `font-display=swap` on font imports

### Phase 2: Interactive feedback
4. Add `:active` scale transforms to nav items, channel items, cards, buttons
5. Override MatMenu entrance animation

### Phase 3: Animation timing
6. Reduce content entrance animations to 300ms max
7. Refactor card shadow animation to use pseudo-element opacity

### Phase 4: Typography polish
8. Add `text-wrap: balance` to headings
9. Add `text-wrap: pretty` to description text

---

## Verification

- `nx serve web` — visually verify each fix in browser
- Test with Chrome DevTools > Rendering > "Emulate prefers-reduced-motion: reduce"
- Tab through the app to verify focus indicators
- Check font loading with slow 3G throttling (font-display)
- Run `nx test web` to ensure no regressions
